arts.ttl: Girona vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal’s final game of the Champions League league phase sees them travel to Spanish outfit Girona. Although not mathematically guaranteed to advance into the last 16, Arsenal’s superior goal difference and three-point gap between ninth position means it is highly likely even a defeat would send them through.
